subject: Human Resources
title: Stay Interviews
description: A quick, practical guide to Stay Interviews.

hook.text: Exit interviews reveal why people leave. Stay interviews ask why they haven't—and what might make them.

buildup.text: Stay interviews are one-on-one conversations with current employees about what keeps them and what frustrates them.

discovery.text: They're proactive—addressing concerns before they become reasons to resign. Prevention beats cure every time.

twist.text: Most companies only ask why people left. By then it's too late—the insight comes after the damage is done.

climax.text: A simple question: 'What would make your experience here even better?' opens doors that surveys can't.

punchline.text: Don't wait for the exit to ask the question.

quiz.question: How do stay interviews differ from exit interviews?
options: They proactively address concerns before people leave
They're conducted after an employee resigns
